Uses of Class
xyz.noxlydev.nxgate.NxGate

  • Uses of NxGate in xyz.noxlydev.nxgate

    Methods in xyz.noxlydev.nxgate that return NxGate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    NxGate
    NxGate.debug()
    Enable debug mode to print request, response and error information to the console.
    NxGate
    NxGate.setPublicRsaKey(String publicRsaKey)
    Set the public RSA key of the license owner's NxGate account.
    NxGate
    NxGate.setValidationServer(String validationServer)
    Set the validation server URL.
    NxGate
    NxGate.useChallenges()
    Enable the use and verification of challenges.
    NxGate
    NxGate.withMetadataAugmentation(boolean enable)
    When enabled, the metadata string sent to the server is augmented with machineFp=...;jarFp=... so admins can detect tampering / cloned hardware.
    NxGate
    NxGate.withRetry(int attempts, long backoffMs)
    Enable automatic retry of transient failures (CONNECTION_ERROR / SERVER_ERROR).
    NxGate
    NxGate.withTimeout(int connectMs, int readMs)
    Set HTTP timeouts.
    NxGate
    NxGate.withTlsPinning(List<String> sha256Fingerprints)
    Pin one or more server certificate SHA-256 fingerprints (hex, no colons).
